---
name: Security Vulnerability
about: Report a security vulnerability
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
assignees: Muneer320

---

**Please do NOT file public security reports.**
For critical vulnerabilities, email muneer.alam320@gmail.com directly with:
- Subject: "BCD Security Vulnerability"
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce (if applicable)
- Suggested fix (if applicable)

**For non-critical issues:**
Describe the security concern.

**Affected component:**
- [ ] Frontend (React/Vite)
- [ ] Backend (FastAPI/Python)
- [ ] AI/ML pipeline
- [ ] Authentication/SSO
- [ ] Data storage
- [ ] API
- [ ] Third-party dependency
- [ ] Infrastructure/CI/CD

**Severity estimate:**
- [ ] Critical (user data at risk)
- [ ] High (limited data exposure)
- [ ] Medium (defense-in-depth improvement)
- [ ] Low (informational)

**Additional context**
